decision: Option B — ccusage remains authoritative for per-project cost surface
rationale: CodexBar cost data (codexbar_cost_per_day.json) is date×model granularity only. No session→project metadata join is available from the sanitized CodexBar export (codexbar_cost_daily.json). Per-project attribution therefore cannot use CodexBar as primary. ccusage (via cost_by_project_estimated.json, which uses session-weighted allocation from unified.duckdb) remains the authoritative per-project source until Phase 4 adds the session→project join.

gap_summary.note: Per-project CodexBar vs ccusage comparison deferred to Phase 4. Daily-level deficit_pct is available in unified_costs.json (Phase 2c) as a global validation metric.
